messages.content:
Traduci tutto in inglese comprensibile, suggerendomi delle eventuali migliorie:

An American guy è seduto di fronte a una maglietta stesa sul tavolo.
In mano ha un pennello con cui comincia a disegnare delle strisce parallele.
Nel frattempo, sulle note di un famoso coro da ultras, lo sentiamo cantare.
VO: We are the hardcore fans, we go the extra mile
He pulls up the shirt, and we see that he’s also printed the player’s name on the back.
VO: For our team, we overcome any trial.




Cut.
We’re near a scientific laboratory in the middle of the Arctic ice. 
In the midst of a blizzard, a scientist tries to position a satellite dish. 
Sentiamo la sua voce attutita dal forte vento, mentre continua il coro della scena precedente.
VO: Our hearts and minds with our team reconciled.
L’uomo rientra nel laboratorio. His colleagues offer him a beer: he’s managed to find the game’s signal for the TV. Tutti cantano insieme.
VO: Being far from the match, yet still, we compile.

An American guy is sitting in front of a t-shirt laid out on a table. He is holding a paintbrush and starts to draw parallel stripes on it. Meanwhile, we hear him singing along to a famous fans' choir. 
VO: "We are the hardcore fans, we go the extra mile."
He lifts the shirt up, and we can see that he has also printed the player's name on the back. 
VO: "For our team, we overcome any trial".

Cut. 
We are near a scientific laboratory in the middle of the Arctic ice, where a scientist is attempting to position a satellite dish in a blizzard. We can hear his voice muffled by the strong wind, still singing the same chant from the previous shot. 
VO: "Our hearts and minds with our team reconciled." 
The scientist returns to the laboratory, and his colleagues offer him a beer. He has managed to find the game's signal for the TV, and everyone starts singing together. 
VO: "Being far from the match, yet still, we compile."

Cut.
Open on an aerial shot of a large Asian city at night.
Inside a dorm room, two young men are trying desperately to stay awake. 
As soon as one nods off, the other sprays him with a bottle of water, and vice versa.
Uno dei due, con la voce di chi sta sbadigliando, canta.
VO: We are the hardcore fans, we go the extra mile,
They’re staying up to watch the Champions League, which happens in the middle of the night for them.
VO: Staying up late, just to see our team’s style.




Cut.
We’re in a convent dining hall. The camera shows some nuns sitting next to each other with hands clasped in prayer. But they’re not praying for dinner. They’re praying for the Champions League game: l’attaccante sta infatti per calciare un rigore.
In coro, come se fosse una preghiera, cantano anche loro.
VO: Keep the faith strong, and cheer with a smile

Cut. 
Open with an aerial shot of a large Asian city at night. 
Inside a dorm room, two young men are struggling to stay awake. Whenever one of them nods off, the other sprays him with water, and vice versa. 
One of them, with a tired voice, starts to sing. 
VO: "We are the hardcore fans, we go the extra mile."
They are staying up late to watch the Champions League game, which airs in the middle of the night for them. 
VO: "Staying up late, just to see our team's style."

Cut. 
We are in a convent dining hall, where the camera shows a group of nuns sitting side by side in prayer. However, they are not praying for dinner; they are praying for the Champions League game. As the striker prepares to kick a penalty, they start singing in unison like a prayer. 
VO: "Keep the faith strong, and cheer with a smile."

Cut.
We’re in a South American women’s hair salon. Some are under the dryer hood, others are getting their hair dried.
In the midst of them, a hairdresser has just finished cutting another client’s hair: the haircut of her favorite football player.
Anche lei, come gli altri, canta lo stesso coro.
VO: Changing ourselves, our support always on file.




Cut.
In the living room of her apartment, surrounded by her child’s toys, a single mother watches the Champions League with her friend. We see that next to the beer on the table is a switched on baby monitor. Clearly, her kid is upstairs sleeping.
The mother is singing a bassa voce.
VO: We are the hardcore fans, we go the extra mile.
As something exciting happens in the game, the two women cheer excitedly, but without making any noise to avoid waking up the kid. 
VO: Always cheering loud, making us worthwhile.

Cut. 
We are now in a South American women's hair salon. Some women are sitting under the hooded hair dryers, while others are getting their hair styled. Amidst them, a hairdresser has just finished giving a haircut to a client, who requested her favorite football player's style. 
Like everyone else, the hairdresser also sings the same chant. 
VO: "Changing ourselves, our support always on file."

Cut. 
In the living room of her apartment, a single mother is watching the Champions League game with her friend, surrounded by her child's toys. We can see a baby monitor switched on next to the beer on the table, indicating that her child is sleeping upstairs. 
The mother sings to herself in a low voice. 
VO: "We are the hardcore fans, we go the extra mile." 
As something exciting happens in the game, the two women cheer excitedly but quietly, trying their best not to wake the child. 
VO: "Always cheering loud, making us worthwhile."

An American guy è seduto di fronte a una maglietta stesa sul tavolo.
Sul suo smartphone, fa partire la canzone che ascolteremo per tutta la durata dello spot: We are the champions dei Queen.
Sfx: We are the champions, my friend…
In mano ha un pennello con cui comincia a disegnare delle strisce parallele.
He pulls up the shirt, and we see that he’s also printed the player’s name on the back.




Cut.
We’re near a scientific laboratory in the middle of the Arctic ice. 
In the midst of a blizzard, a scientist tries to position a satellite dish. 
Sentiamo la sua voce attutita dal forte vento, canticchiare la melodia della canzone dei Queen.
L’uomo rientra nel laboratorio. His colleagues offer him a beer: he’s managed to find the game’s signal for the TV. 
Seduti sul divano, tutti cantano in coro.
VO: And we'll keep on fighting till the end…

An American guy is sitting in front of a t-shirt laid out on a table. He starts playing the song that will accompany the entire commercial on his smartphone: "We Are The Champions" by Queen. 
Sfx: "We are the champions, my friend..." 
He holds a paintbrush and starts drawing parallel stripes on the shirt. 
He lifts the shirt up, and we can see that he has also printed the player's name on the back.

Cut. 
We are near a scientific laboratory in the Arctic ice during a blizzard, where a scientist is trying to position a satellite dish. 
We hear his voice humming along to the Queen song. 
The scientist returns to the laboratory, and his colleagues offer him a beer: he has managed to find the game's signal for the TV. 
Sitting on the couch, they all sing in unison. 
VO: "And we'll keep on fighting till the end..."

Cut.
Open on an aerial shot of a large Asian city at night.
Da un locale lontano sentiamo proseguire la canzone dei Queen.
Inside a dorm room, two young men are trying desperately to stay awake. 
As soon as one nods off, the other sprays him with a bottle of water, and vice versa.
They’re staying up to watch the Champions League, which happens in the middle of the night for them.



Cut.
We’re in a convent dining hall. The camera shows some nuns sitting next to each other with hands clasped in prayer. But they’re not praying for dinner. They’re praying for the Champions League game: l’attaccante sta infatti per calciare un rigore… e segna.
Le suore alzano le braccia al cielo e urlano.
VO: We are the champions…

Cut. 
An aerial shot of a large Asian city at night. We can hear the continuation of the Queen song coming from a distant venue. 
Inside a dorm room, two young men are struggling to stay awake. Whenever one of them nods off, the other sprays him with water, and vice versa. 
They are staying up late to watch the Champions League, which airs in the middle of the night for them.

Cut. 
We are in a convent dining hall. The camera shows a group of nuns sitting side by side with their hands clasped in prayer. However, they are not praying for dinner; they are praying for the Champions League game, where the striker is about to take a penalty and score. 
The nuns raise their arms to the sky and scream. 
VO: "We are the champions..."

Cut.
We’re in a South American women’s hair salon. Some are under the dryer hood, others are getting their hair dried.
In the midst of them, a hairdresser has just finished cutting another client’s hair: the haircut of her favorite football player.
Anche lei, come gli altri, canta lo stesso coro.
VO: No time for losers…



Cut.
In the living room of her apartment, surrounded by her child’s toys, a single mother watches the Champions League with her friend. We see that next to the beer on the table is a switched on baby monitor. Clearly, her kid is upstairs sleeping.
In quel momento parte la suoneria di un telefono: è la canzone dei Queen.
Sfx: 'Cause we are the champions of the world…
La donna con un gesto veloce mette il silenzioso e proprio in quel momento, as something exciting happens in the game, the two friends cheer excitedly, but without making any noise to avoid waking up the kid.

Cut. 
We are in a South American women's hair salon. Some women are sitting under the hooded hair dryers, while others are getting their hair dried. 
Inside the salon, a hairdresser has just finished giving a haircut to a client who requested the style of her favorite football player. 
Like everyone else, the hairdresser also sings the same chant. 
VO: "No time for losers..."

Cut. 
In the living room of her apartment, a single mother is watching the Champions League game with her friend, while surrounded by her child's toys. We can see a baby monitor switched on next to the beer on the table, indicating that her child is sleeping upstairs. 
At that moment, the Queen song plays as a ringtone on a phone. 
Sfx: "'Cause we are the champions of the world..." 
With a swift gesture, the woman puts the phone on silent, and as something exciting happens in the game, the two friends cheer excitedly but quietly, doing their best not to wake the sleeping child.

An American guy è seduto di fronte a una maglietta stesa sul tavolo.
In mano ha un pennello con cui comincia a disegnare delle strisce parallele.
He pulls up the shirt, and we see that he’s also printed the player’s name on the back.
È il giorno della partita di Champions League e si sta preparando per tifare la sua squadra.
In secondo piano, intravediamo il televisore che trasmette la sigla della Champions.




Cut.
We’re near a scientific laboratory in the middle of the Arctic ice. 
In the midst of a blizzard, a scientist tries to position a satellite dish. 
Sentiamo la sua voce attutita dal forte vento, canticchiare la melodia della canzone dei Queen.
L’uomo rientra nel laboratorio. His colleagues offer him a beer: he’s managed to find the game’s signal for the TV proprio un attimo prima che la partita cominci.

An American guy is sitting in front of a t-shirt laid out on a table. He holds a paintbrush and starts drawing parallel stripes on it. 
He lifts the shirt up, and we can see that he has also printed the player's name on the back. 
It is the day of the Champions League game, and he is preparing to support his team. 
In the background, we catch a glimpse of a TV screen displaying the Champions League intro.

Cut. 
We are near a scientific laboratory in the Arctic ice during a blizzard, where a scientist is trying to position a satellite dish. 
We can hear his voice humming along to the Queen song. 
The scientist returns to the laboratory, and his colleagues offer him a beer: he has managed to find the game's signal for the TV just before the match starts.

Cut.
Open on an aerial shot of a large Asian city at night.
Inside a dorm room, two young men are trying desperately to stay awake. 
As soon as one nods off, the other sprays him with a bottle of water.
He needs to stay up: the Champions League match is about to start.



Cut.
We’re in a convent dining hall. The camera shows some nuns sitting next to each other with hands clasped in prayer. But they’re not praying for dinner. 
Un controcampo ci mostra il televisore di fronte a loro: la partita di Champions sta per cominciare.

Cut. 
We open with an aerial shot of a large Asian city at night. 
Inside a dorm room, two young men are struggling to stay awake. Whenever one of them nods off, the other sprays him with water. 
They need to stay up because the Champions League game is about to start.

Cut. 
Now we are in a convent dining hall, where the camera shows a group of nuns sitting side by side with their hands clasped in prayer. However, they are not praying for dinner. A reverse shot shows a television set up in front of them, indicating that the Champions League match is about to start.

Cut.
We’re in a South American women’s hair salon. Some are under the dryer hood, others are getting their hair dried.
In the midst of them, a hairdresser has just finished cutting another client’s hair with the haircut of her favorite football player.
Appena esce dal negozio la vediamo entrare nel bar di fianco. Ora è pronta per il match.



Cut.
In the living room of her apartment, surrounded by her child’s toys, a single mother watches the Champions League with her friend. We see that next to the beer on the table is switched on baby monitor. Clearly, her kid is upstairs sleeping.
Without making any noise to avoid waking up the kid, the two women cheer excitedly. In TV vediamo il logo della Champions League al centro del campo: la partita sta per cominciare.

Cut. 
We are now inside a South American women's hair salon where some women are sitting under the hooded hair dryers, while others are getting their hair dried. 
In the midst of them, a hairdresser has just given a client a haircut inspired by her favorite football player. As she leaves the salon, we see her walk into the bar next door, ready to watch the match.

Cut. 
We are in the living room of a single mother's apartment, surrounded by her child's toys. We can see a baby monitor switched on next to the beer on the table, indicating that her child is sleeping upstairs. 
The two women watch the Champions League match and cheer excitedly, but doing their best not to disturb the sleeping child. 
On the TV screen, we see the Champions League logos at the center of the field, indicating that the match is about to begin.

An American guy pulls up a shirt of his favourite football club.
Sembra proprio un fan hardcore. 
In quel momento, la scena si riavvolge su se stessa e un lento reverse ci mostra che è stato lui stesso, con un pennello, a disegnare delle strisce parallele per trasformarla in una maglietta da calcio.



Cut.
Vediamo alcuni amici seduti di fronte alla televisione con alcune birre mentre guardano la Champions League.
Un reverse ci mostra che non sono semplici amici: sono degli scienziati in un laboratorio in mezzo ai ghiacci artici.
Mentre la scena si riavvolge vediamo che solo grazie allo sforzo di uno di loro, che ha posizionato una parabola affrontando la tempesta, sono riusciti ad avere il segnale per il match.

An American guy pulls up his favorite football club's shirt. He looks like a hardcore fan. 
Suddenly, the scene reverses, and we slowly see that he himself used a paintbrush to draw parallel stripes and turn the shirt into a football jersey.

Cut. 
We see some friends sitting in front of a television with some beers, watching the Champions League. However, a reverse shot shows that they are not just ordinary friends; they are scientists working in a laboratory in the middle of the Arctic ice. 
As the scene rewinds, we see that they were only able to get the game's signal thanks to the effort of one of them, who positioned a satellite dish in the midst of the storm.
